zh.Shevington, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾分頓
zh.Upton, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾厄普頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Bridgett Upton於1458年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾厄普頓時，她的父親John Upton Of Tralaske26歲，母親Elizabeth Mohun22歲。她於1476年與Lord George Woodward在英國英格蘭藍卡爾分頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1545年8月30日在英國英格蘭享年87歲。

zh-hans.Upton, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾厄普頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bridgett Upton于1458年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾厄普頓时，她的父亲John Upton Of Tralaske26岁，母亲Elizabeth Mohun22岁。她于1476年与Lord George Woodward在英国英格兰藍卡爾分頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于1545年8月30日在英国英格兰享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Upton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places in England called Upton, most of which are named with Old English upp ‘upper’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have different origins, such as one in Essex, originally named with the phrase upp in tūne ‘up in the settlement’, i.e. the higher part of the settlement, and Upton Lovell (Wiltshire), which derives from the Old English personal name Ubba + Old English tūn. This name was brought to Ireland (Antrim) in 1598 by Henry Upton, from Upton in Devon.

variants.name: Uptain
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of English   Upton  .

nameMeanings.name: Bridgett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Brighid (pronounced ‘breed’); . This was the name of an ancient Celtic goddess, which in Gaulish would have been Brigindos, meaning ‘the exalted one’. St Brigid of Kildare ( c.450– c.525 ) is one of the patron saints of Ireland. Very few facts are known about her life. She founded a religious house for women at Kildare, and is said to be have been buried at Downpatrick, where St Patrick and St Columba were also buried. Many of the stories of miracles told about St Brigid seem to be Christianized versions of pagan legends concerning the goddess. The popularity of the name was further reinforced throughout Europe, especially in Scandinavia in the form Birgit , as the name of the patron saint of Sweden ( 1304–73 ). She was a noblewoman of Irish stock who, after the death of her husband, founded an order of nuns, the Bridgettines. Later she went to Rome and attempted to introduce religious reforms there.

en.lifeSummary: When Bridgett Upton was born in 1458, in Upton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Upton Of Tralaske, was 26 and her mother, Elizabeth Mohun, was 22. She married Lord George Woodward in 1476, in Shevington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died on 30 August 1545, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bridgett Upton est née en 1458, à Upton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Upton Of Tralaske, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Mohun, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Lord George Woodward en 1476, à Shevington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée le 30 août 1545, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bridgett Upton 1458 in Upton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Upton Of Tralaske 26 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Mohun 22. Sie hat 1476 in Shevington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Lord George Woodward geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb am 30. August 1545 im Alter von 87 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bridgett Upton è nata il nel 1458 nel Upton, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Upton Of Tralaske, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Mohun, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Lord George Woodward nel 1476, nel Shevington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì il 30 agosto 1545, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 87 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Bridgett Upton(이)가 1458년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 업턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Upton Of Tralaske(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Mohun(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1476년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 셰빙턴에서 Lord George Woodward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1545년 8월 30일 영국 잉글랜드에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bridgett Upton родилась в 1458 г. в местности уптон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Upton Of Tralaske было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Mohun, 22.
